subcodes.first_line: As to what was written concerning marriage, it is not permissible to abstain therefrom, inasmuch as it is among the divine ordinances established amongst humanity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اینکه در باب تأهل نوشته بودند گذشتن از آن جایز نه چه که از سنن الهیه ما بین بریه است
subcodes.subjects: @laws of marriage and dowry, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
